message:
test(fcp-core): pin MigratableComputationState transitions + serde shape (flywheel_connectors-cgfwt)

Pin the migration state machine that exists in connector_state.rs:589
({Running, Suspended, Transferring, Completed, Failed}). The bead
text mentions Loaded/Activated/Terminated which are absent from the
code; the test documents that mismatch and pins the actual variants.

Coverage: 5-variant enumeration sentinel, is_terminal truth table,
JSON tag form per variant including Transferring payload, JSON
round-trip, CBOR round-trip on unit variants, CBOR map shape on
Transferring (full-roundtrip via Content shim hits a known serde +
hex_or_bytes interaction), PascalCase + unknown + missing-tag
rejection, equality across nested Transferring payloads, and
InvalidStateTransition Display format on every variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
